content:
# Plan and Implement

## Change Summary

Implemented the pending `ralph-burning-9ni.3.3` amendments for legacy milestone-plan consumption and canonicalized implicit-bead validation. `src/cli/project.rs` now backfills any legacy `plan.json` bead entry with a populated `bead_id` as `explicit_id: true`, so `project create-from-bead` preserves flow overrides and membership confirmation for planner-authored short or qualified bead IDs even after live bead titles drift. `src/contexts/milestone_record/bundle.rs` now rejects duplicate titles across all non-explicit bead proposals, including canonicalized `explicit_id: false` entries that already carry generated bead IDs, preventing ambiguous implicit-title fallback after `render_plan_json`. Added deterministic regressions in CLI unit/integration coverage plus milestone bundle validation tests for both cases.

## Steps

1. [Completed] Inspect the legacy explicit-id backfill path in `src/cli/project.rs` and the non-explicit duplicate-title validation path in `src/contexts/milestone_record/bundle.rs` to confirm the failure modes behind the pending amendments.
2. [Completed] Patch milestone-plan loading so legacy populated `bead_id` values are always backfilled as explicit, and widen bundle validation so duplicate titles are rejected for every non-explicit bead, including canonicalized implicit entries.
3. [Completed] Add deterministic regressions for legacy short bead IDs with title drift and for duplicate canonicalized implicit titles, then run focused formatting and validation.

## Validation Evidence

- Ran `cargo fmt --all`.
- Ran `cargo test resolve_bead_plan_ -- --nocapture` and all 6 targeted CLI resolution unit tests passed, including the new legacy short-ID backfill regression.
- Ran `cargo test bundle_validation_rejects_ -- --nocapture` and all 10 targeted milestone-bundle validation tests passed, including the new canonicalized implicit-title duplication regression.
- Ran `cargo test project_create_from_bead_ -- --nocapture` and all 15 targeted CLI integration tests passed, including the new legacy short bead-id with live title drift regression.
- Ran `cargo test milestone_bundle_contract_validates_and_renders_plan_markdown -- --nocapture` and the milestone bundle rendering contract test passed.

## Outstanding Risks

- Did not run the full repository test suite beyond the targeted CLI resolution/integration, bundle validation, and milestone contract regressions.
- The worktree still contains the unrelated untracked `.ralph-burning/` directory, which was left untouched.
